notes: Suppresses the NASEMSO/NREMT trauma call-type checklist when this scenario uses the universal NREMT trauma base rubric plus NAT-specific scenario items. The NAT scenario scores recognition, documentation quality, and behavioral observation — not acute traumatic intervention. Keeping both rubrics active double-scores primary survey items and introduces false protocol misses (e.g., bleeding control, O2 administration) for a hemodynamically stable patient.

operations.reason: Universal NREMT trauma base rubric owns PPE/BSI for this training scenario.
